description_long: This sculpture depicts three human figures, likely representing a family or group, standing closely together on a rectangular base. The figures are nude and rendered in a realistic style, with detailed anatomical features and expressive postures. The tallest figure stands at the back, gazing upward, while the two smaller figures are positioned in front, one with an arm raised and the other with an arm around the middle figure. The surface of the sculpture appears to be made of bronze or a similar metal, with a weathered, dark patina. The figures are closely grouped, creating a sense of unity and connection. The base is simple and flat, providing stability for the upright figures.
description: A realistic bronze sculpture of three closely grouped nude human figures on a rectangular base, with expressive postures and a dark patina.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three figures, with the tallest at the back and two smaller figures in front, one with an arm raised.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the upward gaze of the tallest figure and the overlapping arrangement of the group.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the figures and the close grouping, with the base clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the figures and the outstretched arm of the front figure.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
